summary: Completed testing of Iteration 22 - Storefront Orders Admin View. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly including stats cards, search, status filters, view order modal, and update status modal.
critical_code_review_comments: Storefront Orders page loads correctly at /storefront-orders
Stats cards display correct counts (Total, Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered)
Search functionality filters orders by order ID, customer name, email correctly
Status filter dropdown works with all status options
Clicking stats cards filters orders by that status
Clear button appears when filter is active
Order table displays all columns (Order, Date, Customer, Status, Payment, Total, Actions)
View order modal shows complete order details including customer info, shipping address, items, payment, and status history
Update status modal allows changing order status with note
Status update API correctly updates status and adds to history
Sidebar navigation includes 'Storefront Orders' under Sales section
seed_data_creation: Used existing test orders from iteration 21: SF26010618276729 (cancelled->confirmed), SF26010618268026 (shipped), SF26010618252090 (pending)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 Storefront Orders admin view fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/storefront/orders (list with filters), GET /api/storefront/orders/{id} (single order), PUT /api/storefront/orders/{id}/status (update status). Frontend route: /storefront-orders. Features: stats cards, search, status filter dropdown, view order modal, update status modal. All CRUD operations working correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/storefront/orders: PASS - Returns list of orders with pagination

frontend_ui.stats_cards_display: PASS - Shows Total, Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered counts
frontend_ui.search_functionality: PASS - Filters by order ID, customer name, email
frontend_ui.stats_card_click_filter: PASS - Clicking card filters by status
frontend_ui.order_table_columns: PASS - Order, Date, Customer, Status, Payment, Total, Actions
frontend_ui.update_status_modal: PASS - Status dropdown, note input, buttons
frontend_ui.status_update_flow: PASS - Updates status and shows toast
frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Storefront Orders under Sales section
